title: Bitwarden Setup Guide
content:
Bitwarden is an open-source password manager that makes it easy to generate, store, and secure your passwords across all your devices. In this guide, we will walk you through setting up your Bitwarden account, installing the browser extension, and configuring your vault for maximum security.

Recommended Tools

  • Bitwarden CLI: A command-line tool to manage your Bitwarden vault.
  • YubiKey: A hardware security key for multi-factor authentication.
